title: Cobbletopia
description: Explore the Cobbletopia region to catch lots of cool cool "Cobblemon"
body:
![Header](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/Cobbletopia/BH_Cobbletopia_Header.webp)
![Overview](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/Cobbletopia/BH_Cobbletopia_Overview.webp)
Venture into the "Cobbletopia" region! Inside this region you will find a myriad of "Pokémon" ready to be captured! Furthermore, around the Cobbletopia region you can collect "apricorns" with which to craft "Pokéballs" to capture as many Pokémon as you want. Complete your "Pokédex" to be a real Pokémon trainer! Remember... Gotta Catch 'Em all!
![Features](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/Cobbletopia/BH_Cobbletopia_Features.webp)

                                                              PokéBalls

                                                              Apricorns

                                                             500+ Pokémon

                                                            Pokémon Battles

                                                            And Much More...
